subsections.verseText: "AND MY GOD WILL MEET ALL YOUR NEEDS ACCORDING TO THE RICHES OF HIS GLORY IN CHRIST JESUS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, provide financially for Pastor Antwan and all our leaders! Meet their personal needs, family needs, and ministry needs. Give them more than enough. Let them lack nothing. Provide from Your glorious riches!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, give our pastor and leaders all the money they need for everything!

subsections.title: FEAR OF THE LORD
subsections.desc: & The fear of the Lord is where true knowledge and wisdom begin.
subsections.verseText: "FEAR OF THE LORD IS THE FOUNDATION OF TRUE KNOWLEDGE, BUT FOOLS DESPISE WISDOM AND DISCIPLINE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, increase the fear of the Lord in Jesus People Church! Give us holy reverence for You. Let us tremble at Your Word. Remove casual, flippant attitudes toward You. Restore awe, wonder, and holy fear of who You are! Make us a people who fear You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help us respect You and know how amazing and powerful You are!

subsections.title: PHYSICAL HEALTH
subsections.desc: & God hears our cries and restores health.
subsections.verseText: "O LORD MY GOD, I CRIED TO YOU FOR HELP, AND YOU RESTORED MY HEALTH."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, give my church, my family and friends physical health and healing! Heal sickness, disease, and injuries. Restore their bodies to full health. Strengthen their immune systems. Keep them well and strong!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, make my family and friends healthy and strong! Heal anyone who is sick!

subsections.title: JUSTICE IN LEGAL SYSTEMS
subsections.desc: God commands nations to establish justice and defend the vulnerable.
subsections.verseText: "LEARN TO DO GOOD. SEEK JUSTICE. HELP THE OPPRESSED. DEFEND THE CAUSE OF ORPHANS. FIGHT FOR THE RIGHTS OF WIDOWS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, bring justice to the legal and court systems of South Africa, USA, and Israel! Remove corrupt judges. Appoint righteous judges who fear You. Let the innocent be declared innocent and the guilty held accountable. Defend the oppressed!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, make judges and courts fair! Help them do what's right and protect people who can't protect themselves!

sections.title: Sorry & Forgive
sections.verse: "And forgive us our sins, as we have forgiven those who sin against us."

subsections.title: HARMFUL WORDS
subsections.desc: Our words should build up, not tear down.
subsections.verseText: "DON'T USE FOUL OR ABUSIVE LANGUAGE. LET EVERYTHING YOU SAY BE GOOD AND HELPFUL, SO THAT YOUR WORDS WILL BE AN ENCOURAGEMENT TO THOSE WHO HEAR THEM."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, I confess gossip, slander, and harmful words. I've said things about others that I shouldn't have said. I've torn people down with my words instead of building them up. I've spread rumors and talked behind backs. Forgive me! Tame my tongue. I also forgive [name person] who gossiped about me or spoke harmful words. I release them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, I'm sorry for saying mean things about people and talking about them. Help me say nice things! I forgive people who said mean things about me!

sections.title: Stay Safe
sections.verse: "And don't let us yield to temptation, but rescue us from the evil one."

subsections.title: DIVISION
subsections.desc: & Unity must be protected among leaders.
subsections.verseText: "I APPEAL TO YOU, DEAR BROTHERS AND SISTERS, BY THE AUTHORITY OF OUR LORD JESUS CHRIST, TO LIVE IN HARMONY WITH EACH OTHER. LET THERE BE NO DIVISIONS IN THE CHURCH. RATHER, BE OF ONE MIND, UNITED IN THOUGHT AND PURPOSE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, protect Pastor Antwan and all our leaders from division! Don't let the enemy create misunderstandings, conflicts, or disagreements among them and their families. Keep them united in vision and purpose. Guard their relationships with each other!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, don't let our leaders fight or disagree! Keep them loving each other and working together!

subsections.title: FROM COMPROMISE
subsections.desc: Believers must be protected from conforming to worldly standards.
subsections.verseText: "DON'T COPY THE BEHAVIOR AND CUSTOMS OF THIS WORLD, BUT LET GOD TRANSFORM YOU INTO A NEW PERSON BY CHANGING THE WAY YOU THINK."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect every church member from compromise and worldliness! Guard us from adopting the world's values, behaviors, and beliefs. Keep us set apart. Transform our thinking. Don't let us blend in with the world!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help us be different from the world and live the way You want!

subsections.title: CRIME VIOLENCE
subsections.desc: & God is faithful to guard us from evil and violence. &
subsections.verseText: "BUT THE LORD IS FAITHFUL; HE WILL STRENGTHEN YOU AND GUARD YOU FROM THE EVIL ONE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, protect Jesus People, my family and friends from crime and violence! Guard them from theft, assault, robbery, carjacking, and every violent crime. Keep them safe from criminals and those who want to harm them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, protect my family and friends from bad people who steal and hurt others!

subsections.title: RELIGIOUS FREEDOM
subsections.desc: Even when persecuted, believers are blessed and belong to God's kingdom.
subsections.verseText: "GOD BLESSES THOSE WHO ARE PERSECUTED FOR DOING RIGHT, FOR THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN IS THEIRS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect religious freedom in South Africa, USA, and Israel! Defend the right to worship You freely. Stop persecution of believers. Don't let governments restrict faith. Preserve our freedom to preach, teach, and live out our faith!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, don't let anyone stop us from worshiping You and telling others about You!

sections.title: Thank You
sections.verse: "For Yours is the kingdom and the power and the glory forever. Amen."

subsections.title: FOR BREAKTHROUGH NOT YET SEEN
subsections.desc: We praise God and remember all the good things He does.
subsections.verseText: "LET ALL THAT I AM PRAISE THE LORD; MAY I NEVER FORGET THE GOOD THINGS HE DOES FOR ME."
subsections.adultPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for breakthrough I haven't seen yet! Thank You for coworkers and classmates being saved! Thank You for shame and guilt broken! Thank You for special needs children healed! Thank You for financial provision for our leaders! Thank You for fear of the Lord increasing! Thank You for health for my family! Thank You for justice in our nations! YOURS is the kingdom! YOURS is the power! YOURS is the glory forever! AMEN!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for all the good things You do! I won't forget! Amen!

sections.title: Love God
sections.verse: "This, then, is how you should pray: 'Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name...' We pray the name of God.

subsections.title: EL SHADDAI
subsections.subtitle: God Almighty
subsections.desc: El Shaddai means God Almighty - the all-powerful,
subsections.adultPrayer: El Shaddai, You are God ALMIGHTY! Nothing is impossible for You! You have all power, all strength, all might. You are the all-sufficient One who meets every need. You are holy - unlimited in power and authority! I worship You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, You can do anything! You're the most powerful! You are holy! I love You!

sections.title: Help Others
sections.verse: "May Your kingdom come soon. May Your will be done on earth, as it is in heaven."

subsections.title: OUR NEIGHBORS
subsections.desc: Jesus commands us to love our neighbors, which includes sharing the gospel with them.
subsections.verseText: "LOVE YOUR NEIGHBOR AS YOURSELF."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, save my neighbors! Let them encounter Jesus. Give me opportunities to share the gospel with them. Let my life be a testimony of Your love. Bring salvation to every household in my neighborhood!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, save my neighbors! Help me show them Your love and tell them about You!

subsections.title: CONTROLLING RELATIONSHIPS
subsections.desc: Jesus frees people from every form of slavery, including controlling relationships.
subsections.verseText: "IT IS FOR FREEDOM THAT CHRIST HAS SET US FREE. STAND FIRM, THEN, AND DO NOT LET YOURSELVES BE BURDENED AGAIN BY A YOKE OF SLAVERY."
subsections.adultPrayer: Jesus, deliver people in Jesus People from controlling, manipulative, and abusive relationships! Break the power of controllers. Give victims courage to leave. Set them free from emotional, spiritual, and physical bondage. Let them experience healthy relationships!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help people get away from mean people who control them and hurt them. Keep them safe!

subsections.title: INFERTILITY REPRODUCTIVE ISSUES
subsections.desc: God opens wombs and gives children to those who long for them. &
subsections.verseText: "HE GIVES THE CHILDLESS WOMAN A FAMILY, MAKING HER A HAPPY MOTHER. PRAISE THE LORD!"
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord Jesus, heal infertility and reproductive issues at church! Open wombs. Heal PCOS, endometriosis, low sperm count, and every reproductive condition. Give children to those who long for them. Make the barren woman a joyful mother!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help moms and dads who want babies but can't have them. Give them babies!

sections.title: Our Needs
sections.verse: "Give us today the food we need."

subsections.title: UNITY
subsections.desc: & God delights when leaders work together in unity and harmony.
subsections.verseText: "HOW WONDERFUL AND PLEASANT IT IS WHEN BROTHERS LIVE TOGETHER IN HARMONY!"
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, create and protect unity among Pastor Antwan and the entire leadership team! Keep them on the same page. Give them one vision, one heart, one purpose. Remove misunderstandings and conflicts. Let them work together in perfect harmony!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help all our leaders love each other and work together as a team!

subsections.title: SIGNS, WONDERS MIRACLES
subsections.desc: & God confirms His Word with signs, wonders, and miracles. &
subsections.verseText: "AND THE BELIEVERS WERE FILLED WITH JOY AND WITH THE HOLY SPIRIT."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, release signs, wonders, and miracles in Jesus People Church! Let the supernatural become normal. Heal the sick! Work miracles! Confirm Your Word with signs following. Let people see Your power and believe! Demonstrate Your kingdom!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, do amazing miracles at our church! Heal people! Do things only You can do!

subsections.title: CHILDREN LOVE GOD
subsections.desc: & Children trained in God's ways will walk with Him their whole lives.
subsections.verseText: "TRAIN UP A CHILD IN THE WAY HE SHOULD GO, AND WHEN HE IS OLD HE WILL NOT DEPART FROM IT."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, let the children in my church, family and among my friends walk with You! Give them genuine faith from a young age. Protect them from rebellion. Keep them on the path of righteousness. Let them serve You their whole lives!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help the kids in my family love You and follow You their whole lives!

subsections.title: UNITY AMONG PEOPLE
subsections.desc: In Christ, all divisions are removed and we are one.
subsections.verseText: "THERE IS NO LONGER JEW OR GENTILE, SLAVE OR FREE, MALE AND FEMALE. FOR YOU ARE ALL ONE IN CHRIST JESUS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, bring unity among diverse people groups in South Africa, USA, and Israel! Break down walls of division. Heal racial tensions and ethnic conflicts. Help different groups love and respect each other. Make us one!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help people of different colors and backgrounds love each other and get along!

sections.title: Sorry & Forgive
sections.verse: "And forgive us our sins, as we have forgiven those who sin against us."

subsections.title: IMPURITY
subsections.desc: Sexual sin uniquely affects us and must be fled from.
subsections.verseText: "RUN FROM SEXUAL SIN! NO OTHER SIN SO CLEARLY AFFECTS THE BODY AS THIS ONE DOES. FOR SEXUAL IMMORALITY IS A SIN AGAINST YOUR OWN BODY."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, I confess sexual sin and impurity. [Be specific - pornography, premarital sex, adultery, lustful thoughts, etc.] I've sinned against my own body and against You. Forgive me! Wash me clean. Make me pure. I also forgive [name person] involved in sexual sin with me or who led me into sin. I release them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, I'm sorry for looking at bad things and thinking wrong thoughts. Make me pure! I forgive people who did wrong things with me!

sections.title: Stay Safe
sections.verse: "And don't let us yield to temptation, but rescue us from the evil one."

subsections.title: STRENGTH
subsections.desc: & Leaders face opposition but are not destroyed because God sustains them.
subsections.verseText: "WE ARE PRESSED ON EVERY SIDE BY TROUBLES, BUT WE ARE NOT CRUSHED. WE ARE PERPLEXED, BUT NOT DRIVEN TO DESPAIR."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, give Pastor Antwan and all our leaders strength against opposition and persecution! When people criticize, attack, or oppose them, strengthen them. Don't let opposition crush them. Give them perseverance to keep going!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, make our leaders strong when people are mean to them and say bad things!

subsections.title: TO STAND FIRM
subsections.desc: Those who hope in the Lord receive strength and courage.
subsections.verseText: "SO BE STRONG AND COURAGEOUS, ALL YOU WHO PUT YOUR HOPE IN THE LORD!"
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, give every church member strength to stand firm in faith! Don't let us waver or fall away. Strengthen us when we're weak. Give us courage when we're afraid. Help us stand strong no matter what!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, make us strong so we don't give up when things are hard!

subsections.title: ANGELIC PROTECTION
subsections.desc: & God commands His angels to guard and protect us.
subsections.verseText: "FOR HE WILL ORDER HIS ANGELS TO PROTECT YOU WHEREVER YOU GO."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, I ask that you will send Your angels to protect my family and friends! Surround them with angelic guards. Let angels go before them, beside them, and behind them. Protect them from seen and unseen dangers!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, send Your angels to protect my family and friends everywhere they go!

subsections.title: EVIL IDEOLOGIES
subsections.desc: Believers must be protected from philosophies that contradict God's truth.
subsections.verseText: "DON'T LET ANYONE CAPTURE YOU WITH EMPTY PHILOSOPHIES AND HIGH-SOUNDING NONSENSE THAT COME FROM HUMAN THINKING AND FROM THE SPIRITUAL POWERS OF THIS WORLD, RATHER THAN FROM CHRIST."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, shield South Africa, USA, and Israel from evil ideologies and movements that oppose Your truth! Protect our nations from philosophies, laws, and movements that promote sin and destroy righteousness. Guard our nations from spiritual darkness!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, protect our countries from bad ideas and lies that hurt people!

sections.title: Thank You
sections.verse: "For Yours is the kingdom and the power and the glory forever. Amen."

subsections.title: FOR BREAKTHROUGH NOT YET SEEN
subsections.desc: We thank God in all circumstances because that's His will for us.
subsections.verseText: "ALWAYS BE JOYFUL. NEVER STOP PRAYING. BE THANKFUL IN ALL CIRCUMSTANCES, FOR THIS IS GOD'S WILL FOR YOU WHO BELONG TO CHRIST JESUS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for breakthrough I haven't seen yet! Thank You for neighbors being saved! Thank You for people freed from controlling relationships! Thank You for infertility healed and babies coming! Thank You for unity among our leaders! Thank You for signs, wonders, and miracles! Thank You for children walking with You! Thank You for unity in our nations! YOURS is the kingdom! YOURS is the power! YOURS is the glory forever! AMEN!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, in everything! You're so good! Amen!

sections.title: Love God
sections.verse: "This, then, is how you should pray: 'Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name...' We pray the name of God.

subsections.title: JEHOVAH TSIDKENU
subsections.subtitle: The Lord Our Righteousness
subsections.desc: Jesus is our righteousness. We
subsections.adultPrayer: Jehovah Tsidkenu, You are the Lord my RIGHTEOUSNESS! I am righteous not because of what I've done, but because of what You've done. You make me right with God. You clothe me in Your righteousness. You are holy - perfectly righteous and pure! I worship You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, You make me right and good! Not because I'm perfect, but because of Jesus! You are holy! I love You!

sections.title: Help Others
sections.verse: "May Your kingdom come soon. May Your will be done on earth, as it is in heaven."

subsections.title: FALLING DEEPER IN LOVE
subsections.desc: Believers can fall more deeply in love with Jesus even though they can't see Him.
subsections.verseText: "YOU LOVE HIM EVEN THOUGH YOU HAVE NEVER SEEN HIM. THOUGH YOU DO NOT SEE HIM NOW, YOU TRUST HIM; AND YOU REJOICE WITH A GLORIOUS, INEXPRESSIBLE JOY."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, let church members fall deeper in love with Jesus! Stir up fresh passion for You. Reignite first love. Deepen relationship and intimacy with You. Let us love You more today than yesterday, and more tomorrow than today!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help everyone at church love You more and more every day!

subsections.title: FROM FINANCIAL BONDAGE & DEBT
subsections.desc: & Debt creates bondage, and Jesus sets people free from financial slavery.
subsections.verseText: "THE RICH RULE OVER THE POOR, AND THE BORROWER IS SLAVE TO THE LENDER."
subsections.adultPrayer: Jesus, deliver people from financial bondage and debt! Break the chains of credit card debt, student loans, mortgages they can't afford, and every financial burden. Set them free! Give them wisdom to manage money. Lead them to financial freedom!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help people get out of debt and not owe money anymore! Help them be free!

subsections.title: FROM ADDICTIONS & DEPENDENCIES
subsections.desc: Truth sets people free from bondage and addiction. &
subsections.verseText: "AND YOU WILL KNOW THE TRUTH, AND THE TRUTH WILL SET YOU FREE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord Jesus, heal addictions and dependencies in our church! Heal addiction to substances, food, technology, work, shopping, and every compulsive behavior. Break the chains completely. Heal the wounds that drive addiction. Set people free!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, heal people who can't stop doing bad things that hurt them. Set them free!

sections.title: Our Needs
sections.verse: "Give us today the food we need."

subsections.title: BOLDNESS IN PREACHING
subsections.desc: & The gospel is powerful and should be preached boldly without shame.
subsections.verseText: "FOR I AM NOT ASHAMED OF THIS GOOD NEWS ABOUT CHRIST. IT IS THE POWER OF GOD AT WORK, SAVING EVERYONE WHO BELIEVES."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, give Pastor Antwan, all our leaders and their families, boldness to preach Your Word! Let them preach the full gospel without compromise. Remove fear of man. Give them holy courage to speak truth even when it's unpopular. Anoint their words with power!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, make our leaders brave to preach the truth about You even when people don't like it!

subsections.title: A PERMANENT BUILDING
subsections.desc: & Only what God builds will last.
subsections.verseText: "UNLESS THE LORD BUILDS A HOUSE, THE WORK OF THE BUILDERS IS WASTED."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, provide a permanent building for Jesus People Church! Give us land, finances, favor, and everything needed. Build the house with Your own hands. Give us a place to gather, worship, and minister. Provide our permanent home!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, give our church our own building where we can meet all the time!

subsections.title: WISDOM IN PARENTING
subsections.desc: & Parents who train children in God's ways will see them walk with God.
subsections.verseText: "DIRECT YOUR CHILDREN ONTO THE RIGHT PATH, AND WHEN THEY ARE OLDER, THEY WILL NOT LEAVE IT."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, give church parents and others wisdom in raising their children! Show them how to discipline with love, teach with patience, and model faith genuinely. Give them discernment for each child's unique needs. Help them raise godly children!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help moms and dads know how to raise their kids to love You!

subsections.title: NATIONAL REPENTANCE
subsections.desc: When nations repent and turn to God, He heals their land.
subsections.verseText: "IF MY PEOPLE WHO ARE CALLED BY MY NAME WILL HUMBLE THEMSELVES AND PRAY AND SEEK MY FACE AND TURN FROM THEIR WICKED WAYS, I WILL HEAR FROM HEAVEN AND WILL FORGIVE THEIR SINS AND RESTORE THEIR LAND."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, bring national repentance and turning to You in South Africa, USA, and Israel! Convict hearts of sin. Lead people to humble themselves and pray. Turn our nations back to You. Forgive our sins. Heal our lands!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help everyone in our countries say sorry for sin and turn back to You! Heal our countries!

sections.title: Sorry & Forgive
sections.verse: "And forgive us our sins, as we have forgiven those who sin against us."

subsections.title: IDOLATRY
subsections.desc: God must be first. Nothing can take His place.
subsections.verseText: "YOU MUST NOT HAVE ANY OTHER GOD BUT ME."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, I confess idolatry. I've made money, success, comfort, and relationships more important than You. I've worshiped created things instead of the Creator. I've put other things on the throne of my heart. Forgive me! You alone are God. I also forgive [name person] who led me into idolatry or competed with You for my affection. I release them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, I'm sorry for loving other things more than You. You're the most important! I forgive people who tried to be more important than You!

sections.title: Stay Safe
sections.verse: "And don't let us yield to temptation, but rescue us from the evil one."

subsections.title: GUARD THEIR MARRIAGES
subsections.desc: & Marriage must be honored and protected, especially for leaders.
subsections.verseText: "GIVE HONOR TO MARRIAGE, AND REMAIN FAITHFUL TO ONE ANOTHER IN MARRIAGE. GOD WILL SURELY JUDGE PEOPLE WHO ARE IMMORAL AND THOSE WHO COMMIT ADULTERY."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, guard the marriages of Pastor Antwan and all our leaders! Protect them from temptation, infidelity, and anything that would destroy their marriages. Keep their love strong. Help them honor their spouses. Shield their marriages from the enemy!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, protect the marriages of our pastor and leaders! Keep them loving their wives/husbands!

subsections.title: FROM FEAR
subsections.desc: Fear doesn't come from God.
subsections.verseText: "FOR GOD HAS NOT GIVEN US A SPIRIT OF FEAR AND TIMIDITY, BUT OF POWER, LOVE, AND SELF-DISCIPLINE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, guard every church member from fear and intimidation! Drive out fear of the future, fear of failure, fear of people, and every tormenting fear. Replace fear with faith, power, love, and a sound mind!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, don't let us be scared! Make us brave and strong!

subsections.title: FROM ONLINE DANGERS
subsections.desc: & What we consume online affects us - we reap what we sow.
subsections.verseText: "DON'T BE MISLED—YOU CANNOT MOCK THE JUSTICE OF GOD. YOU WILL ALWAYS HARVEST WHAT YOU PLANT."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, guard my church family, my family and friends from online dangers and social media harm! Protect them from cyberbullying, predators, pornography, scams, and harmful content. Give them wisdom about what to watch and post. Keep them safe online!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, keep my family and friends safe from bad things online and on their phones!

subsections.title: RACIAL DIVISION & HATRED
subsections.desc: In Christ, racial and ethnic divisions are removed. &
subsections.verseText: "THERE IS NO LONGER JEW OR GENTILE, SLAVE OR FREE, MALE AND FEMALE. FOR YOU ARE ALL ONE IN CHRIST JESUS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, guard South Africa, USA, and Israel from racial division and hatred! Stop racism, prejudice, and ethnic hostility. Heal wounds from the past. Help people see each other as brothers and sisters. Remove hatred and bring unity!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, stop people from hating others because of their skin color! Help everyone love each other!

sections.title: Thank You
sections.verse: "For Yours is the kingdom and the power and the glory forever. Amen."

subsections.title: FOR BREAKTHROUGH NOT YET SEEN
subsections.desc: When we ask in Jesus' name, we receive and our joy is complete.
subsections.verseText: "YOU HAVEN'T DONE THIS BEFORE. ASK, USING MY NAME, AND YOU WILL RECEIVE, AND YOU WILL HAVE ABUNDANT JOY."
subsections.adultPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for breakthrough I haven't seen yet! Thank You for church members falling deeper in love with You! Thank You for financial freedom and debt broken! Thank You for addictions healed! Thank You for bold preaching! Thank You for our permanent building! Thank You for parents' wisdom! Thank You for nations turning to You! YOURS is the kingdom! YOURS is the power! YOURS is the glory forever! AMEN!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for answering when we pray in Your name! You give us joy! Amen!

sections.title: Love God
sections.verse: "This, then, is how you should pray: 'Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name...' We pray the name of God.

subsections.title: ROHI
subsections.subtitle: The Lord My Shepherd
subsections.desc: God is our shepherd who JEHOVAH provides for us like sheep.
subsections.adultPrayer: Jehovah Rohi, You are the Lord my SHEPHERD! You lead me. You feed me. You protect me. You provide everything I need. I am Your sheep and You are my good shepherd. You are holy - faithful and caring! I worship You, my Shepherd!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, You're my shepherd! You take care of me like sheep! You give me everything I need! You are holy! I love You!

sections.title: Help Others
sections.verse: "May Your kingdom come soon. May Your will be done on earth, as it is in heaven."

subsections.title: THOSE WITH HARD HEARTS
subsections.desc: God calls people to respond today and not harden their hearts.
subsections.verseText: "TODAY WHEN YOU HEAR HIS VOICE, DON'T HARDEN YOUR HEARTS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, save people who've heard the gospel many times but never responded! Soften their hard hearts. Break through their resistance and excuses. Don't let them put it off any longer. Bring them to decision TODAY! Save them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, save people who know about You but haven't said yes yet! Help them say yes today!

subsections.title: FROM THE SPIRIT OF REJECTION
subsections.desc: Even when rejected by people, God accepts and holds us close.
subsections.verseText: "EVEN IF MY FATHER AND MOTHER ABANDON ME, THE LORD WILL HOLD ME CLOSE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Jesus, deliver people in our world and at church from the spirit of rejection! Heal wounds from abandonment, betrayal, and being unwanted. Break the lie that they're not enough. Let them know they're accepted, loved, and wanted by You. Destroy rejection!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help people who feel left out and unwanted know that You love them and want them!

subsections.title: FROM PAINFUL MEMORIES & PTSD
subsections.desc: God heals painful memories and trauma that haunt people. &
subsections.verseText: "HE HEALS THE BROKENHEARTED AND BANDAGES THEIR WOUNDS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord Jesus, heal painful memories and PTSD! Heal veterans, abuse survivors, accident victims, and all carrying traumatic memories. Heal the wounds in their minds and hearts. Remove nightmares and flashbacks. Give them peace. Restore what trauma stole!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, heal people whose memories make them scared and sad. Give them peace and help them sleep!

sections.title: Our Needs
sections.verse: "Give us today the food we need."

subsections.title: REST
subsections.desc: & Jesus is our rest.
subsections.verseText: "THEN JESUS SAID, 'LET'S GO OFF BY OURSELVES TO A QUIET PLACE AND REST AWHILE.' HE SAID THIS BECAUSE THERE WERE SO MANY PEOPLE COMING AND GOING THAT JESUS AND HIS APOSTLES DIDN'T EVEN HAVE TIME TO EAT."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, give Pastor Antwan and all our leaders rest, refreshment, and sabbath! Help them take time to renew. Restore their souls. Give them refreshing sleep, joyful recreation, and quality family time. Prevent burnout through rest!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help our leaders rest and have fun! Don't let them work too hard all the time!

subsections.title: MORE LABORERS
subsections.desc: & Jesus commands us to pray for more workers in God's harvest.
subsections.verseText: "THE HARVEST IS GREAT, BUT THE WORKERS ARE FEW. SO PRAY TO THE LORD WHO IS IN CHARGE OF THE HARVEST; ASK HIM TO SEND MORE WORKERS INTO HIS FIELDS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, send more laborers into the harvest at Jesus People Church! Raise up workers for children's ministry, youth ministry, worship, prayer, hospitality, administration, and every area of service. Call people to serve. Send us the workers we need!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help more people serve at church! We need helpers everywhere!

subsections.title: GODLY MARRIAGES
subsections.desc: & God designed marriage to be a strong, united bond.
subsections.verseText: "THIS EXPLAINS WHY A MAN LEAVES HIS FATHER AND MOTHER AND IS JOINED TO HIS WIFE, AND THE TWO ARE UNITED INTO ONE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, strengthen and restore marriages in our church, my family and among my friends! Heal broken marriages. Restore love where it's grown cold. Bring unity where there's division. Save marriages on the brink of divorce. Make marriages strong!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, make marriages in my family strong! Help husbands and wives love each other!

subsections.title: GOD'S PURPOSES FULFILLED
subsections.desc: God has good plans and purposes for nations.
subsections.verseText: "FOR I KNOW THE PLANS I HAVE FOR YOU,' SAYS THE LORD. 'THEY ARE PLANS FOR GOOD AND NOT FOR DISASTER, TO GIVE YOU A FUTURE AND A HOPE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, fulfill Your purposes and plans in South Africa, USA, and Israel! Accomplish everything You've destined for our nations. Raise up the people, resources, and circumstances needed. Let Your will be done. Complete Your plans!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, do everything You planned for our countries! Make good things happen!

sections.title: Sorry & Forgive
sections.verse: "And forgive us our sins, as we have forgiven those who sin against us."

subsections.title: UNBELIEF & DOUBT
subsections.desc: With faith, all things are possible. &
subsections.verseText: "ANYTHING IS POSSIBLE IF A PERSON BELIEVES."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, I confess unbelief and doubting Your promises. I've questioned whether You can really do what You said. I've let circumstances overshadow Your Word. I've doubted instead of believed. Forgive me! Increase my faith. I also forgive [name person] who caused me to doubt You or Your promises. I release them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, I'm sorry for not believing You can do what You promised. Help me believe! I forgive people who made me doubt!

sections.title: Stay Safe
sections.verse: "And don't let us yield to temptation, but rescue us from the evil one."

subsections.title: GOOD DOCTRINE
subsections.desc: & Leaders must guard their doctrine and teaching carefully.
subsections.verseText: "WATCH YOUR LIFE AND DOCTRINE CLOSELY. PERSEVERE IN THEM, BECAUSE IF YOU DO, YOU WILL SAVE BOTH YOURSELF AND YOUR HEARERS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, protect Pastor Antwan and all our leaders and their families, from false teaching and deception! Guard their doctrine. Keep them rooted in truth. Don't let them be led astray by popular but unbiblical ideas. Preserve sound doctrine!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help our leaders teach only what's true from the Bible! Don't let them be tricked!

subsections.title: DISCOURAGEMENT
subsections.desc: God promises blessing to those who don't give up.
subsections.verseText: "SO LET'S NOT GET TIRED OF DOING WHAT IS GOOD. AT JUST THE RIGHT TIME WE WILL REAP A HARVEST OF BLESSING IF WE DON'T GIVE UP."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect every church member from discouragement and hopelessness! When we're tired of waiting, renew our hope. When ministry is hard, strengthen us. When we want to quit, remind us of the harvest coming. Don't let us give up!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, when we feel sad and want to quit, help us keep going! We won't give up!

subsections.title: FINANCIAL SCAMS & LOSS
subsections.desc: & God guides and protects us from making harmful decisions. &
subsections.verseText: "THE LORD SAYS, 'I WILL GUIDE YOU ALONG THE BEST PATHWAY FOR YOUR LIFE. I WILL ADVISE YOU AND WATCH OVER YOU."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, guard my family and friends from financial scams and loss! Protect them from fraudsters, pyramid schemes, bad investments, and people trying to steal their money. Give them wisdom and discernment. Watch over their finances!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, protect my family and friends from people trying to trick them and steal their money!

subsections.title: INJUSTICE & LAWLESSNESS
subsections.desc: Nations must stand against injustice and defend the vulnerable. &
subsections.verseText: "OPEN YOUR MOUTH FOR THE SPEECHLESS, IN THE CAUSE OF ALL WHO ARE APPOINTED TO DIE. OPEN YOUR MOUTH, JUDGE RIGHTEOUSLY, AND PLEAD THE CAUSE OF THE POOR AND NEEDY."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect South Africa, USA, and Israel from injustice and lawlessness! Stop corruption in courts and police. Defend the innocent. Bring justice for victims. Uphold the rule of law. Protect the vulnerable!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, protect people from being treated unfairly! Make sure bad people get caught and good people are safe!

sections.title: Thank You
sections.verse: "For Yours is the kingdom and the power and the glory forever. Amen."

subsections.title: FOR BREAKTHROUGH NOT YET SEEN
subsections.desc: Through Christ, we have strength for everything.
subsections.verseText: "I CAN DO EVERYTHING THROUGH CHRIST, WHO GIVES ME STRENGTH."
subsections.adultPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for breakthrough I haven't seen yet! Thank You for people responding to the gospel! Thank You for rejection broken! Thank You for memories and PTSD healed! Thank You for rest for our leaders! Thank You for more laborers! Thank You for marriages restored! Thank You for Your purposes fulfilled in our nations! YOURS is the kingdom! YOURS is the power! YOURS is the glory forever! AMEN!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for making me strong to do everything! You're amazing! Amen!

sections.title: Love God
sections.verse: "This, then, is how you should pray: 'Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name...' We pray the name of God.

subsections.title: THE MOST HIGH GOD
subsections.desc: El Elyon means the Most High God - there is no one above EL ELYON -Him. He is supreme over all.
subsections.adultPrayer: El Elyon, You are the MOST HIGH GOD! There is no one above You, no one greater than You, no one higher than You. You are supreme over all creation, all powers, all authorities. You are holy - exalted above all! I worship You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, You're the highest! No one is bigger or more powerful than You! You are holy! I love You!

sections.title: Help Others
sections.verse: "May Your kingdom come soon. May Your will be done on earth, as it is in heaven."

subsections.title: THOSE WHO THINK THEY'RE TOO FAR GONE
subsections.desc: Jesus died for us while we were still sinners - no one is too far gone.
subsections.verseText: "BUT GOD SHOWED HIS GREAT LOVE FOR US BY SENDING CHRIST TO DIE FOR US WHILE WE WERE STILL SINNERS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, save those who think they're too far gone to be saved! Break the lie that they've sinned too much or gone too far. Show them Your grace reaches everyone. Let them know it's never too late. Save them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, save people who think they're too bad for You to love! Show them You love everyone!

subsections.title: PRIDE SELF-RELIANCE
subsections.desc: & God resists proud people but helps the humble.
subsections.verseText: "GOD OPPOSES THE PROUD BUT GIVES GRACE TO THE HUMBLE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Jesus, deliver people, us and the church, from pride and self-reliance! Break the spirit of arrogance and independence. Humble hearts that are puffed up. Help people see their need for You. Replace pride with humility and self-reliance with dependence on You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help proud people become humble and know they need You!

subsections.title: FROM AUTOIMMUNE DISEASES
subsections.desc: God forgives all sin and heals all diseases, including autoimmune conditions.
subsections.verseText: "HE FORGIVES ALL MY SINS AND HEALS ALL MY DISEASES."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord Jesus, heal autoimmune diseases! Heal lupus, rheumatoid arthritis, multiple sclerosis, Crohn's disease, Type 1 diabetes, and every condition where the body attacks itself. Command immune systems to function properly. Heal completely!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, heal people whose bodies are fighting themselves! Make their bodies work right!

sections.title: Our Needs
sections.verse: "Give us today the food we need."

subsections.title: GODLY CHARACTER
subsections.desc: & Leaders must have strong character and integrity to lead effectively.
subsections.verseText: "HE MUST HAVE A STRONG BELIEF IN THE TRUSTWORTHY MESSAGE HE WAS TAUGHT; THEN HE WILL BE ABLE TO ENCOURAGE OTHERS WITH WHOLESOME TEACHING AND SHOW THOSE WHO OPPOSE IT WHERE THEY ARE WRONG."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, develop godly character and integrity in Pastor Antwan, all our leaders and their families! Make them people of honesty, purity, humility, and faithfulness. Let their private lives match their public ministries. Build Christ-like character in them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, make our leaders good, honest, and pure in everything they do!

subsections.title: TEACHABILITY
subsections.desc: & Humility and reverence for God lead to blessing.
subsections.verseText: "TRUE HUMILITY AND FEAR OF THE LORD LEAD TO RICHES, HONOR, AND LONG LIFE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, give Jesus People Church a spirit of humility and teachability! Remove pride and arrogance. Make us quick to learn and slow to think we know it all. Help us receive correction. Keep us humble before You and each other!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help everyone at church be humble and ready to learn! Don't let us be proud!

subsections.title: SPIRITUAL GROWTH
subsections.desc: & God wants us to continually grow spiritually.
subsections.verseText: "BUT GROW IN THE GRACE AND KNOWLEDGE OF OUR LORD AND SAVIOR JESUS CHRIST. ALL GLORY TO HIM, BOTH NOW AND FOREVER! AMEN."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, grow my church, my family and friends spiritually! Deepen their relationship with You. Increase their knowledge of Scripture. Mature them in faith. Help them grow from glory to glory. Don't let them stay stagnant - grow them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help my family and friends grow and know You better every day!

subsections.title: GOD'S NATIONAL SECURITY
subsections.desc: Only God can truly protect nations and their borders.
subsections.verseText: "UNLESS THE LORD PROTECTS A CITY, GUARDING IT WITH SENTRIES WILL DO NO GOOD."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect the borders and national security of South Africa, USA, and Israel! Guard our borders from illegal entry, terrorism, and threats. Protect our military and security forces. Give leaders wisdom. Be our ultimate defense!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, keep our countries' borders safe! Protect soldiers and police who keep us safe!

sections.title: Sorry & Forgive
sections.verse: "And forgive us our sins, as we have forgiven those who sin against us."

subsections.title: LACK OF GRATITUDE
subsections.desc: God commands us to do everything without complaining.
subsections.verseText: "DO EVERYTHING WITHOUT COMPLAINING AND ARGUING."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, I confess complaining and lack of gratitude. I've grumbled about my circumstances instead of thanking You. I've focused on what's wrong instead of what's right. I've been ungrateful. Forgive me! Make me thankful. I also forgive [name person] who complained to me or about me. I release them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, I'm sorry for complaining and not saying thank you. Help me be thankful! I forgive people who complain!

sections.title: Stay Safe
sections.verse: "And don't let us yield to temptation, but rescue us from the evil one."

subsections.title: EXHAUSTION
subsections.desc: & God gives strength to those who are weak and exhausted.
subsections.verseText: "HE GIVES POWER TO THE WEAK AND STRENGTH TO THE POWERLESS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, shield Pastor Antwan, his family, all our leaders and their families, from burnout and exhaustion! When they're tired, renew them. When they're depleted, fill them. Don't let ministry drain them dry. Give supernatural strength and energy!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, don't let our leaders get too tired! Give them energy and strength!

subsections.title: CHILDREN YOUTH
subsections.desc: Jesus protects and values children. &
subsections.verseText: "BUT JESUS SAID, 'LET THE CHILDREN COME TO ME. DON'T STOP THEM! FOR THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN BELONGS TO THOSE WHO ARE LIKE THESE CHILDREN."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, guard the children and youth of Jesus People Church from evil! Protect them from abuse, predators, bad influences, and dangerous choices. Keep them pure. Surround them with godly mentors. Guard their hearts for You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, protect all the kids and teenagers at church! Keep them safe and help them love You!

subsections.title: NATURAL DISASTERS
subsections.desc: & God is our safe place in every disaster.
subsections.verseText: "GOD IS OUR REFUGE AND STRENGTH, ALWAYS READY TO HELP IN TIMES OF TROUBLE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, protect our church, my family and friends from natural disasters! Protect them from floods, fires, earthquakes, hurricanes, tornadoes, and every destructive force of nature. Be their refuge and safety in every storm!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, keep my family and friends safe from big storms, fires, and earthquakes!

subsections.title: SHIELD FROM EVIL COUNSEL
subsections.desc: Leaders need wise, godly advisors.
subsections.verseText: "THERE IS SAFETY IN HAVING MANY ADVISERS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, shield the leaders of South Africa, USA, and Israel from evil counsel and influence! Protect them from advisors with evil agendas. Surround them with wise, godly counselors. Don't let wicked people influence national decisions!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, don't let bad people give our leaders bad advice! Surround them with good, wise helpers!

sections.title: Thank You
sections.verse: "For Yours is the kingdom and the power and the glory forever. Amen."

subsections.title: FOR BREAKTHROUGH NOT YET SEEN
subsections.desc: When we trust God, He helps us and fills us with joy.
subsections.verseText: "THE LORD IS MY STRENGTH AND SHIELD. I TRUST HIM WITH ALL MY HEART. HE HELPS ME, AND MY HEART IS FILLED WITH JOY. I BURST OUT IN SONGS OF THANKSGIVING."
subsections.adultPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for breakthrough I haven't seen yet! Thank You for people who think they're too far gone being saved! Thank You for pride broken! Thank You for autoimmune diseases healed! Thank You for godly character in our leaders! Thank You for humility in our church! Thank You for spiritual growth in families! Thank You for border protection! YOURS is the kingdom! YOURS is the power! YOURS is the glory forever! AMEN!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for helping us! You make us so happy! Amen!

sections.title: Love God
sections.verse: "This, then, is how you should pray: 'Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name...' We pray the name of God.

subsections.title: JEHOVAH SHAMMAH
subsections.subtitle: The Lord Is There
subsections.desc: God is always present - He
subsections.adultPrayer: Jehovah Shammah, You are the Lord who is THERE! You are always present with me. You never leave. You never forsake. When I feel alone, You are there. When I'm afraid, You are there. You are holy - ever-present and faithful! I worship You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, You're always with me! You never leave me alone! You are holy! I love You!

sections.title: Help Others
sections.verse: "May Your kingdom come soon. May Your will be done on earth, as it is in heaven."

subsections.title: RELIGIOUS PEOPLE
subsections.desc: Many religious people miss salvation - knowing about Jesus isn't the same as knowing Him.
subsections.verseText: "YOU CAN ENTER GOD'S KINGDOM ONLY THROUGH THE NARROW GATE. THE HIGHWAY TO HELL IS BROAD, AND ITS GATE IS WIDE FOR THE MANY WHO CHOOSE THAT WAY."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, save religious people in church who don't know Jesus personally! Break through religious traditions and rituals. Let them encounter the real Jesus. Show them that head knowledge isn't heart relationship. Save them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, save people who go to church but don't really know You in their hearts!

subsections.title: BREAKING PRIDE
subsections.desc: When we humble ourselves, God lifts us up.
subsections.verseText: "HUMBLE YOURSELVES BEFORE THE LORD, AND HE WILL LIFT YOU UP IN HONOR."
subsections.adultPrayer: Jesus, deliver people from pride and self-reliance! Break stubborn independence. Forgive us for thinking, we can do life without You. Humble hearts. Replace pride with humility!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help people who think they don't need You realize they really do need You!

subsections.title: IN BROKEN FAMILIES
subsections.desc: Jesus heals families torn apart by conflict, divorce, and brokenness.
subsections.verseText: "HE HEALS THE BROKENHEARTED AND BANDAGES THEIR WOUNDS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord Jesus, heal broken families at church! Restore relationships torn apart by divorce, abandonment, conflict, and hurt. Heal wounds between parents and children. Reconcile estranged family members. Bring healing and restoration!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, fix broken families! Help them love each other again and be together!

sections.title: Our Needs
sections.verse: "Give us today the food we need."

subsections.title: CLEAR VISION
subsections.desc: & Leaders need clear vision from God to lead effectively.
subsections.verseText: "WHERE THERE IS NO VISION, THE PEOPLE PERISH."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, give Pastor Antwan and all our leaders clear vision and direction from You! Show them where You're leading. Reveal Your plans and strategies. Give them clarity about the future. Remove confusion. Speak clearly to them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, show our leaders exactly what You want them to do! Help them hear You clearly!

subsections.title: UNITY IN THE BODY
subsections.desc: & God commands and blesses unity.
subsections.verseText: "HOW WONDERFUL AND PLEASANT IT IS WHEN BROTHERS LIVE TOGETHER IN HARMONY!"
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, create and protect unity in Jesus People Church! Bind us together in love. Remove division, gossip, and factions. Help us honor one another. Make us one body, one spirit, one purpose. Let unity mark us!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help everyone at church get along and love each other! Make us one big family!

subsections.title: PURPOSE CALLING
subsections.desc: & God has purposes and plans for each person. &
subsections.verseText: "FOR WE ARE GOD'S MASTERPIECE. HE HAS CREATED US ANEW IN CHRIST JESUS, SO WE CAN DO THE GOOD THINGS HE PLANNED FOR US LONG AGO."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, help my church family, my family and friends discover and fulfill their purpose and calling! Show them what You created them to do. Open doors for them to walk in their calling. Remove obstacles. Let them fulfill their God-given destiny!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help my family and friends know what You made them to do and help them do it!

subsections.title: RAISING GODLY GENERATIONS
subsections.desc: Nations are blessed when they train children in righteousness.
subsections.verseText: "TEACH YOUR CHILDREN TO CHOOSE THE RIGHT PATH, AND WHEN THEY ARE OLDER, THEY WILL REMAIN UPON IT."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, bless education and raise godly generations in South Africa, USA, and Israel! Protect schools from evil ideologies. Restore biblical values. Raise up teachers who love You. Let the next generation be mighty for You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help schools teach good things! Make the next group of kids and teenagers love You!

sections.title: Sorry & Forgive
sections.verse: "And forgive us our sins, as we have forgiven those who sin against us."

subsections.title: LAZINESS
subsections.desc: We should work as if working for Jesus, not people.
subsections.verseText: "WORK WILLINGLY AT WHATEVER YOU DO, AS THOUGH YOU WERE WORKING FOR THE LORD RATHER THAN FOR PEOPLE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, I confess laziness and wasted time and talents. I've been unproductive when I could have been fruitful. I've wasted the gifts You gave me. I've been lazy instead of diligent. Forgive me! Make me a faithful steward. I also forgive [name person] who wasted my time. I release them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, I'm sorry for being lazy and wasting time. Help me use what You gave me! I forgive people who wasted my time!

sections.title: Stay Safe
sections.verse: "And don't let us yield to temptation, but rescue us from the evil one."

subsections.title: GUARD THEIR CHILDREN
subsections.desc: & Children trained in God's ways stay on the right path.
subsections.verseText: "START CHILDREN OFF ON THE WAY THEY SHOULD GO, AND EVEN WHEN THEY ARE OLD THEY WILL NOT TURN FROM IT."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, guard the children of Pastor Antwan and all our leaders from evil influences, bad friends, and dangerous choices! Protect them from the enemy's attacks on PKs (pastor's kids). Keep them pure and walking with You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, protect the kids of our pastor and leaders! Keep them safe and help them love You!

subsections.title: GOSSIP & SLANDER
subsections.desc: Gossip destroys unity and relationships. &
subsections.verseText: "A TROUBLEMAKER PLANTS SEEDS OF STRIFE; GOSSIP SEPARATES THE BEST OF FRIENDS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect every church member from gossip and slander! Guard us from spreading rumors or listening to them. Protect our reputations from false accusations. Help us speak truth in love. Stop gossip in its tracks!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help us not talk about people in mean ways! Protect us from lies people say about us!

subsections.title: HARMFUL RELATIONSHIPS
subsections.desc: & Bad relationships corrupt good character.
subsections.verseText: "DON'T BE FOOLED BY THOSE WHO SAY SUCH THINGS, FOR 'BAD COMPANY CORRUPTS GOOD CHARACTER."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, shield Jesus People, my family and friends from harmful, toxic relationships! Protect them from manipulative people, abusive partners, and bad influences. Give them wisdom to recognize unhealthy relationships. Surround them with godly people!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, protect my family and friends from people who hurt them or make them do bad things!

subsections.title: PANDEMICS & DISEASE OUTBREAKS
subsections.desc: God's promises protect us like armor. &
subsections.verseText: "HE WILL COVER YOU WITH HIS FEATHERS. HE WILL SHELTER YOU WITH HIS WINGS. HIS FAITHFUL PROMISES ARE YOUR ARMOR AND PROTECTION."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, guard South Africa, USA, and Israel from pandemics and disease outbreaks! Stop the spread of infectious diseases. Protect our nations from health crises. Give wisdom to medical professionals. Be our shield against sickness!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, protect our countries from big sicknesses that spread everywhere! Keep everyone healthy!

sections.title: Thank You
sections.verse: "For Yours is the kingdom and the power and the glory forever. Amen."

subsections.title: FOR BREAKTHROUGH NOT YET SEEN
subsections.desc: If we don't give up, we'll reap a harvest.
subsections.verseText: "SO LET'S NOT GET TIRED OF DOING WHAT IS GOOD. AT JUST THE RIGHT TIME WE WILL REAP A HARVEST OF BLESSING IF WE DON'T GIVE UP."
subsections.adultPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for breakthrough I haven't seen yet! Thank You for religious people being truly saved! Thank You for broken families healed! Thank You for clear vision for our leaders! Thank You for unity in our church! Thank You for my family's calling fulfilled! Thank You for godly generations rising! YOURS is the kingdom! YOURS is the power! YOURS is the glory forever! AMEN!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for blessings coming if we don't give up! You're the best! Amen!

sections.title: Love God
sections.verse: "This, then, is how you should pray: 'Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name...' We pray the name of God.

subsections.title: IMMANUEL
subsections.subtitle: God With Us
subsections.desc: Jesus is Immanuel - God
subsections.adultPrayer: Immanuel, You are GOD WITH US! You left heaven to be with us. You walked among us. You lived with us. You died for us. You rose for us. And You're still with us today. You are holy - present, near, and caring! I worship You, Immanuel!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, You're with us! You came to earth to be with us! You are holy! I love You!

sections.title: Help Others
sections.verse: "May Your kingdom come soon. May Your will be done on earth, as it is in heaven."

subsections.title: IN OUR CITY/REGION
subsections.desc: Jesus came specifically to find and save lost people.
subsections.verseText: "FOR THE SON OF MAN CAME TO SEEK AND SAVE THOSE WHO ARE LOST."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, save the lost in Jesus People South Africa and Jesus People USA. In our City and the surrounding region! Send laborers into the harvest. Let the gospel spread throughout our city. Save thousands! Let Your kingdom come to our region. Bring a wave of salvation!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, save lots of people in our city! Help everyone here know You!

subsections.title: SIN PATTERNS
subsections.desc: God's mercy breaks cycles of sin that have plagued families.
subsections.verseText: "HE DOES NOT PUNISH US FOR ALL OUR SINS; HE DOES NOT DEAL HARSHLY WITH US, AS WE DESERVE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Jesus, break generational sin patterns! Destroy cycles of abuse, addiction, divorce, poverty, and sin that repeat through families. Stop the pattern! Let this generation be the one that breaks free. Establish new patterns of righteousness!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, stop bad things that keep happening in families over and over! Make new good patterns!

subsections.title: AUTOIMMUNE DISEASES
subsections.desc: God heals all our diseases.
subsections.verseText: "BLESS THE LORD, O MY SOUL, AND FORGET NOT ALL HIS BENEFITS, WHO FORGIVES ALL YOUR INIQUITY, WHO HEALS ALL YOUR DISEASES."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord Jesus, heal autoimmune diseases! Restore immune systems. Heal lupus, MS, rheumatoid arthritis, and every autoimmune condition. Command bodies to function properly. Bring complete healing!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, heal people whose bodies are attacking themselves! Fix their immune systems!

sections.title: Our Needs
sections.verse: "Give us today the food we need."

subsections.title: JOY PERSEVERANCE
subsections.desc: & Faithful ministry brings a joyful harvest. &
subsections.verseText: "THOSE WHO PLANT IN TEARS WILL HARVEST WITH SHOUTS OF JOY."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, give Pastor Antwan and all our leaders and their families, joy and perseverance in ministry! When ministry is hard, fill them with joy. When they want to quit, give them perseverance. Let them see the fruit of their labor. Sustain them with joy!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, give our leaders happiness even when ministry is hard! Help them keep going!

subsections.title: OUTREACH
subsections.desc: & Jesus commands us to take the gospel to everyone.
subsections.verseText: "GO INTO ALL THE WORLD AND PREACH THE GOOD NEWS TO EVERYONE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, make Jesus People Church effective in outreach and evangelism! Let us walk in signs, wonders and miracles and all the gifts of the Spirit. Open doors for the gospel. Make us bold witnesses. Let our outreach bear much fruit. Save souls through our efforts!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help our church tell lots of people about You! Help us be brave to share!

subsections.title: CYCLE OF SIN
subsections.desc: & God's love and mercy stop generational curses.
subsections.verseText: "THE LORD PASSED IN FRONT OF MOSES, CALLING OUT, 'YAHWEH! THE LORD! THE GOD OF COMPASSION AND MERCY! I AM SLOW TO ANGER AND FILLED WITH UNFAILING LOVE AND FAITHFULNESS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, break generational sin patterns in my family and among my friends! Stop the cycles of dysfunction, addiction, and sin. Let righteousness flow through generations instead. Establish new godly patterns!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, stop bad patterns in my family! Make good patterns instead!

subsections.title: OUR BORDERS
subsections.desc: Our trust is in God, not military might.
subsections.verseText: "SOME NATIONS BOAST OF THEIR CHARIOTS AND HORSES, BUT WE BOAST IN THE NAME OF THE LORD OUR GOD."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect the borders and national security of South Africa, USA, and Israel! Guard our nations from threats. Protect our military. Give leaders wisdom. Be our ultimate defense and security!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, keep our countries' borders safe! Protect soldiers and everyone who keeps us safe!

sections.title: Sorry & Forgive
sections.verse: "And forgive us our sins, as we have forgiven those who sin against us."

subsections.title: COMPROMISE
subsections.desc: God hates lying and loves truth.
subsections.verseText: "THE LORD DETESTS LYING LIPS, BUT HE DELIGHTS IN THOSE WHO TELL THE TRUTH."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, I confess dishonesty and compromise. I've lied, exaggerated, or withheld truth. I've compromised my values to fit in or get ahead. I've been dishonest in relationships, finances, or work. Forgive me! Make me a person of truth and integrity. I also forgive [name person] who lied to me. I release them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, I'm sorry for lying or not telling the whole truth. Help me always be honest! I forgive people who lied to me!

sections.title: Stay Safe
sections.verse: "And don't let us yield to temptation, but rescue us from the evil one."

subsections.title: FINANCES
subsections.desc: & God supplies all needs from His unlimited riches.
subsections.verseText: "AND THIS SAME GOD WHO TAKES CARE OF ME WILL SUPPLY ALL YOUR NEEDS FROM HIS GLORIOUS RICHES, WHICH HAVE BEEN GIVEN TO US IN CHRIST JESUS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, protect Pastor Antwan and all our leaders and their families, from financial struggles and lack! Provide abundantly for them. Don't let money pressures distract them from ministry. Meet every financial need. Bless them financially!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, give our leaders all the money they need! Don't let them worry about money!

subsections.title: OUR WORDS
subsections.desc: Controlling our words keeps us out of trouble.
subsections.verseText: "WATCH YOUR TONGUE AND KEEP YOUR MOUTH SHUT, AND YOU WILL STAY OUT OF TROUBLE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, help me and every church member to guard our mouths! Tame our tongues. Help us speak truth in love. Protect our community from harmful words. Please give us wisdom to say the right thing and when not to say anything at all.
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help us not say mean things about people! Keep our mouths saying good things!

subsections.title: DISASTERS
subsections.desc: & God is with us even in disaster.
subsections.verseText: "EVEN WHEN I WALK THROUGH THE DARKEST VALLEY, I WILL NOT BE AFRAID, FOR YOU ARE CLOSE BESIDE ME."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, protect my church, my family and friends from natural disasters! Guard them from floods, fires, earthquakes, hurricanes, and storms. Be their shelter in every disaster. Keep them safe!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, protect my family and friends from big storms, fires, and earthquakes!

subsections.title: LOSS OF SOVEREIGNTY
subsections.desc: God is the ultimate King over all nations.
subsections.verseText: "THE LORD IS KING! LET THE NATIONS TREMBLE! HE SITS ON HIS THRONE BETWEEN THE CHERUBIM. LET THE WHOLE EARTH QUAKE!"
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect South Africa, USA, and Israel from invasion and loss of sovereignty! Defend our borders. Preserve our national identity. Protect us from foreign threats. You are our King and protector!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, keep our countries safe from other countries trying to take over! You're the real King!

sections.title: Thank You
sections.verse: "For Yours is the kingdom and the power and the glory forever. Amen."

subsections.title: FOR BREAKTHROUGH NOT YET SEEN
subsections.desc: God can do more than we can imagine.
subsections.verseText: "NOW ALL GLORY TO GOD, WHO IS ABLE, THROUGH HIS MIGHTY POWER AT WORK WITHIN US, TO ACCOMPLISH INFINITELY MORE THAN WE MIGHT ASK OR THINK."
subsections.adultPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for breakthrough I haven't seen yet! Thank You for the lost in our city being saved! Thank You for generational patterns broken! Thank You for joy in our leaders! Thank You for effective evangelism! Thank You for righteousness in families! Thank You for protection over nations! You can do MORE than I can imagine! YOURS is the kingdom! YOURS is the power! YOURS is the glory forever! AMEN!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for doing more than we can imagine! You're amazing! Amen!

sections.title: Love God
sections.verse: "This, then, is how you should pray: 'Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name...' We pray the name of God.

subsections.title: EL ROI
subsections.subtitle: The God Who Sees
subsections.desc: God sees everything - nothing
subsections.adultPrayer: El Roi, You are the God who SEES! You see everything, everywhere, all the time. You are all-knowing! You see my heart right now and You still love me. You are faithful! You are holy - set apart, pure, perfect! There is no one like You! I worship You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God you see everything - nothing is hidden from You. You see my heart, my struggles, my joys. You know me completely and love me perfectly. I love you.

sections.title: Help Others
sections.verse: "May Your kingdom come soon. May Your will be done on earth, as it is in heaven."

subsections.title: FIRST-TIME VISITORS
subsections.desc: When people visit church for the first time, God wants them to experience how good He is and find joy in Him.
subsections.verseText: "TASTE AND SEE THAT THE LORD IS GOOD. OH, THE JOYS OF THOSE WHO TAKE REFUGE IN HIM!"
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, when first-time visitors come to church this Sunday, let them taste and see how good You are! Open their hearts to encounter Jesus. Remove spiritual blindness. Let them experience Your presence and hear the gospel clearly. Save them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help new people who come to church meet You and know how good You are!

subsections.title: FREEDOM FROM FEAR ANXIETY
subsections.desc: & Fear and anxiety don't come from God. He gives us power, love, and a sound mind instead.
subsections.verseText: "FOR GOD HAS NOT GIVEN US A SPIRIT OF FEAR AND TIMIDITY, BUT OF POWER, LOVE, AND SELF-DISCIPLINE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Jesus, set people FREE at church from fear and anxiety! Break the chains of worry that torment them. Destroy panic attacks, phobias, and constant stress. Replace fear with Your power, love, and peace. Let Your perfect love cast out all fear!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help people who are scared and worried. Make them brave and peaceful!

subsections.title: CANCER TERMINAL DISEASES
subsections.desc: God's Word has power to heal even the deadliest diseases and snatch people from death. &
subsections.verseText: "HE SENT OUT HIS WORD AND HEALED THEM, SNATCHING THEM FROM THE DOOR OF DEATH."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord Jesus, send Your word and HEAL those battling cancer and terminal illness at church! Command tumors to dissolve, cells to be restored, and bodies to be made whole. Snatch them from the door of death! Let Your healing power flow right now!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, heal people who are very sick with cancer. Make them completely well!

sections.title: Our Needs
sections.verse: "Give us today the food we need."

subsections.title: WISDOM DISCERNMENT
subsections.desc: & God promises to give wisdom generously to leaders when they ask for it. &
subsections.verseText: "IF YOU NEED WISDOM, ASK OUR GENEROUS GOD, AND HE WILL GIVE IT TO YOU. HE WILL NOT REBUKE YOU FOR ASKING."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, give Pastor Antwan and all our leaders wisdom and discernment! Help them make godly decisions. Give them insight into situations, people, and problems. Let them hear Your voice clearly and know what to do in every circumstance!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, make our pastor and leaders really wise to know what to do!

subsections.title: PRESENCE OF JESUS
subsections.desc: & Jesus promises to be present when His people gather together.
subsections.verseText: "FOR WHERE TWO OR THREE GATHER TOGETHER AS MY FOLLOWERS, I AM THERE AMONG THEM."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord Jesus, let YOUR PRESENCE fill everything we do at Jesus People Church! Every service, every meeting, every small group - let people encounter You! Make us a house of Your glory. Let visitors walk in and immediately sense 'God is here!' Don't let us just do activities - saturate us with Your presence!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, be with us at church! Let everyone feel You there!

subsections.title: SALVATION OF UNSAVED
subsections.desc: & God loves everyone and wants all people to be saved through faith in Jesus.
subsections.verseText: "FOR GOD SO LOVED THE WORLD THAT HE GAVE HIS ONE AND ONLY SON, THAT WHOEVER BELIEVES IN HIM SHALL NOT PERISH BUT HAVE ETERNAL LIFE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, save my unsaved family members and friends! [Name them specifically]. Open their eyes to see Jesus. Soften their hearts to receive the gospel. Send laborers across their path. Draw them to salvation before it's too late!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, please save my family members and friends who don't know You yet!

subsections.title: GODLY LEADERSHIP
subsections.desc: Nations prosper when godly people lead, but suffer under wicked leadership.
subsections.verseText: "WHEN THE GODLY ARE IN AUTHORITY, THE PEOPLE REJOICE. BUT WHEN THE WICKED ARE IN POWER, THEY GROAN."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, raise up godly leaders in South Africa, USA (Jesus People USA) and Israel! Remove corrupt officials. Place righteous men and women in positions of authority who fear You and lead with integrity. Let our nations rejoice under godly leadership!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, give our countries good leaders who love You and do what's right!

sections.title: Sorry & Forgive
sections.verse: "And forgive us our sins, as we have forgiven those who sin against us."

subsections.title: PRIDE SELF- RELIANCE
subsections.desc: God resists proud people but helps those who are humble and depend on Him. &
subsections.verseText: "GOD OPPOSES THE PROUD BUT GIVES GRACE TO THE HUMBLE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, I confess my pride. I've relied on myself instead of You. I've thought I could handle things without Your help. I've been proud of my accomplishments instead of giving You glory. Forgive me! Make me humble and completely dependent on You. I also forgive [name person] who hurt my pride or made me feel small. I release them! Let Jesus People be a place where we walk in repentance and humility.
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, I'm sorry for thinking I'm better than others or don't need Your help. I forgive people who hurt my feelings!

sections.title: Stay Safe
sections.verse: "And don't let us yield to temptation, but rescue us from the evil one."

subsections.title: ENEMY'S ATTACKS
subsections.desc: & God is faithful to protect and strengthen His leaders against Satan's attacks.
subsections.verseText: "BUT THE LORD IS FAITHFUL; HE WILL STRENGTHEN YOU AND GUARD YOU FROM THE EVIL ONE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, protect Pastor Antwan and all our leaders from the enemy's attacks! Shield them from spiritual warfare. Guard them from schemes designed to destroy their ministry in South Africa and the USA. Strengthen them against every arrow shot at them. Surround them with Your protection!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, protect our pastor and leaders from the enemy!

subsections.title: SPIRITUAL ATTACKS
subsections.desc: The devil actively seeks to attack and destroy believers, so we must stay alert and protected.
subsections.verseText: "STAY ALERT! WATCH OUT FOR YOUR GREAT ENEMY, THE DEVIL. HE PROWLS AROUND LIKE A ROARING LION, LOOKING FOR SOMEONE TO DEVOUR."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect every member of Jesus People Church from spiritual attacks! Guard us from the enemy who prowls around seeking to devour us. Shield us from his schemes, lies, and accusations. Keep us alert and strong in faith!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, keep everyone at church safe from the devil!

subsections.title: ROADS TRAVEL
subsections.desc: & God watches over and protects us wherever we go. &
subsections.verseText: "THE LORD KEEPS WATCH OVER YOU AS YOU COME AND GO, BOTH NOW AND FOREVER."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, protect my family and friends on the roads and in all their travels! Guard them from accidents, reckless drivers, and mechanical failures. Watch over them as they come and go. Bring them safely home!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, keep my family and friends safe when they're driving and traveling!

subsections.title: WAR CONFLICT
subsections.desc: God has the power to stop wars and bring peace to nations. &
subsections.verseText: "HE MAKES WARS CEASE TO THE ENDS OF THE EARTH. HE BREAKS THE BOW AND SHATTERS THE SPEAR; HE BURNS THE SHIELDS WITH FIRE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect South Africa, USA, and Israel from war and military conflict! Make wars cease! Stop nations from rising against each other. Break weapons of war. Bring peace where there is tension and hostility!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, stop wars and fighting between countries. Make peace everywhere!

sections.title: Thank You
sections.verse: "For Yours is the kingdom and the power and the glory forever. Amen."

subsections.title: FOR BREAKTHROUGH NOT YET SEEN
subsections.desc: Faith means thanking God for what He's going to do before you see it happen.
subsections.verseText: "FAITH SHOWS THE REALITY OF WHAT WE HOPE FOR; IT IS THE EVIDENCE OF THINGS WE CANNOT SEE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for breakthrough I haven't seen yet! Thank You for first-time visitors being saved! Thank You for people set free from fear and anxiety! Thank You for cancer healed! Thank You for wisdom flooding our leaders! Thank You for Your presence filling our church! Thank You for my family members coming to You! Thank You for godly leaders rising! Thank You for protection! Thank you for USA. YOURS is the kingdom! YOURS is the power! YOURS is the glory forever! AMEN!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Thank You, Jesus, for answering our prayers! You are awesome! Amen!

sections.title: Love God
sections.verse: "This, then, is how you should pray: 'Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name...' We pray the name of God.

subsections.title: JEHOVAH JIREH
subsections.subtitle: The Lord Provides
subsections.desc: God always provides exactly
subsections.adultPrayer: Jehovah Jireh, You are the God who PROVIDES! You see what we need before we ask. You provide at just the right time, in just the right way. You are generous! You are faithful! You never fail to take care of Your children. You are holy - trustworthy and true! I worship You, Provider God!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, You give us everything we need! You always take care of us! I love You!

sections.title: Help Others
sections.verse: "May Your kingdom come soon. May Your will be done on earth, as it is in heaven."

subsections.title: BACKSLIDERS PRODIGALS RETURNING
subsections.desc: & God actively searches for those who have wandered away and rejoices when they return.
subsections.verseText: "OR SUPPOSE A WOMAN HAS TEN SILVER COINS AND LOSES ONE. WON'T SHE LIGHT A LAMP AND SWEEP THE ENTIRE HOUSE AND SEARCH CAREFULLY UNTIL SHE FINDS IT? AND WHEN SHE FINDS IT, SHE WILL CALL IN HER FRIENDS AND NEIGHBORS AND SAY, 'REJOICE WITH ME BECAUSE I HAVE FOUND MY LOST COIN."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, bring backsliders and prodigals HOME! Search for those who have wandered away from You. Draw them back with Your love. Remind them of who they are in You. Let them come to their senses and return! Thank you Jesus.
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, bring back people who walked away from You. Help them come home!

subsections.title: BREAKING ADDICTION
subsections.desc: Jesus has the power to completely break every addiction and set people free.
subsections.verseText: "SO IF THE SON SETS YOU FREE, YOU ARE TRULY FREE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Jesus, break the chains of addiction! Set people at church FREE from drugs, alcohol, pornography, and every enslaving habit. Destroy the strongholds! Give them power to overcome. Let them experience true freedom in You!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help people stop doing bad things they can't stop. Set them free!

subsections.title: TRAUMA EMOTIONAL WOUNDS
subsections.desc: Jesus heals deep emotional wounds from trauma, abuse, and painful experiences. &
subsections.verseText: "HE HEALS THE BROKENHEARTED AND BANDAGES THEIR WOUNDS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord Jesus, heal broken hearts! Heal those carrying trauma from abuse, betrayal, and painful experiences. Bind up their wounds. Restore what was stolen. Heal memories that torment them. Make Jesus People whole emotionally!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, heal people who have sad and hurt hearts from bad things that happened!

sections.title: Our Needs
sections.verse: "Give us today the food we need."

subsections.title: ATTACK BURNOUT
subsections.desc: & God promises to strengthen and protect leaders from spiritual attacks and exhaustion. &
subsections.verseText: "BUT THE LORD IS FAITHFUL; HE WILL STRENGTHEN YOU AND GUARD YOU FROM THE EVIL ONE."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect Pastor Antwan, his family and all our leaders from spiritual attack and burnout! Guard them from exhaustion and discouragement. Renew their strength daily. Shield them from the enemy who seeks to destroy them. Keep them strong and healthy!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, keep our pastor and leaders from getting too tired and attacked by the enemy!

subsections.title: USA CHURCH PLANT
subsections.desc: & God promises to supply everything needed from His unlimited resources.
subsections.verseText: "AND THIS SAME GOD WHO TAKES CARE OF ME WILL SUPPLY ALL YOUR NEEDS FROM HIS GLORIOUS RICHES, WHICH HAVE BEEN GIVEN TO US IN CHRIST JESUS."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, provide EVERYTHING we need for the USA church plant! Provide the finances, the location, the people, the favor, the open doors. Give us wisdom for every decision. Connect us with the right partners. Provide housing, jobs, and community for those moving. Let nothing be lacking! Generously supply all we need!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, give us everything we need to start a new church in America!

subsections.title: UNITY AND LOVE
subsections.desc: & God delights when families live in peace, love, and unity.
subsections.verseText: "HOW WONDERFUL AND PLEASANT IT IS WHEN BROTHERS LIVE TOGETHER IN HARMONY!"
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, bring unity and love to my family! Heal broken relationships. Remove division, bitterness, and conflict. Help us to love each other well, forgive quickly, and live in harmony. Make our family a testimony of Your love!
subsections.kidsPrayer: Jesus, help my family love each other and get along!

subsections.title: PEACE AND SAFETY
subsections.desc: God wants nations to experience peace so people can live godly lives.
subsections.verseText: "I URGE YOU, FIRST OF ALL, TO PRAY FOR ALL PEOPLE. ASK GOD TO HELP THEM; INTERCEDE ON THEIR BEHALF, AND GIVE THANKS FOR THEM. PRAY THIS WAY FOR KINGS AND ALL WHO ARE IN AUTHORITY SO THAT WE CAN LIVE PEACEFUL AND QUIET LIVES MARKED BY GODLINESS AND DIGNITY."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, bring peace and safety to South Africa, USA, and Israel! Stop violence, crime, and terrorism. Protect innocent lives. Let people live in safety and security. Give our nations peaceful and quiet lives!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, make our countries safe and peaceful. Stop bad people from hurting others!

sections.title: Sorry & Forgive
sections.verse: "And forgive us our sins, as we have forgiven those who sin against us."

subsections.title: PRAYER GOD'S WORD
subsections.desc: God wants us to pray continually and stay connected to Him through His Word. &
subsections.verseText: "JESUS TOLD THEM A STORY SHOWING THAT THEY SHOULD ALWAYS PRAY AND NEVER GIVE UP."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, I confess I've neglected prayer and Your Word. I've been too busy for You. I've made other things more important than spending time with You. Forgive me! Restore my hunger for prayer and the Bible. I also forgive [name person] who distracted me or discouraged my prayer life. I release them!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, I'm sorry for not praying and reading my Bible. Please forgive me. I forgive people who kept me from spending time with You!

sections.title: Stay Safe
sections.verse: "And don't let us yield to temptation, but rescue us from the evil one."

subsections.title: DISCOURAGEMENT
subsections.desc: & God promises blessing to those who don't give up when discouraged.
subsections.verseText: "SO LET'S NOT GET TIRED OF DOING WHAT IS GOOD. AT JUST THE RIGHT TIME WE WILL REAP A HARVEST OF BLESSING IF WE DON'T GIVE UP."
subsections.adultPrayer: Lord, guard Pastor Antwan, his family and all our leaders from discouragement and despair! When ministry is hard, lift their spirits. When people disappoint them, encourage their hearts. When they feel like quitting, remind them of Your calling. Don't let them give up!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help our pastor and leaders not feel sad or want to quit!

subsections.title: DECEPTION
subsections.desc: Believers must be protected from lies and false teaching that lead people away from truth.
subsections.verseText: "DEAR FRIENDS, DO NOT BELIEVE EVERYONE WHO CLAIMS TO SPEAK BY THE SPIRIT. YOU MUST TEST THEM TO SEE IF THE SPIRIT THEY HAVE COMES FROM GOD. FOR THERE ARE MANY FALSE PROPHETS IN THE WORLD."
subsections.adultPrayer: Father, protect every church member from deception and false teaching! Guard us from lies that sound good but aren't true. Give us discernment to know what's from You and what's not. Keep us rooted in Your truth!
subsections.kidsPrayer: God, help us know what's true and protect us from lies!

subsections.title: WORK SCHOOL
subsections.desc: & God watches over and protects us in all our daily activities. &
